form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 5th over 390m at this track beaten 5 lengths (22.67) behind Glimmer Of Hope in a Rank Limit - Grade 6 on April 11. Placed two back at this track. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide in home straight.
Quick to begin; Raced approaching winning post.
Checked and lost ground at 150m mark.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.99) when sixth over 390m at Shepparton in a T3 RSTW. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from four starts. Among the main chances.

formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (22.99) when sixth over 390m at Shepparton in a T3 RSTW. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from four starts. Among the main chances.

form.formComment: Scored by half a length last time (22.46) in a T3 RSTW over 390m at Shepparton. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Scored by half a length last time (22.46) in a T3 RSTW over 390m at Shepparton. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a half a length win at this track over 390m in 22.51. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a half a length win at this track over 390m in 22.51. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided entering turn off back straight.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd on April 16 over 390m at Shepparton behind Paw Qatar beaten 1.5 lengths (22.56) in a T3 RSTW. Other runners look much more appealing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd on April 16 over 390m at Shepparton behind Paw Qatar beaten 1.5 lengths (22.56) in a T3 RSTW. Other runners look much more appealing.

form.formComment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.75 lengths at Warragul over 400m (23.13) beating Intrigue in Rank Limit - Grade 7 on April 2. Others make more appeal.

formComments.comment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.75 lengths at Warragul over 400m (23.13) beating Intrigue in Rank Limit - Grade 7 on April 2. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fifth (17.31) at Healesville over 300m. Capable of taking this out.

formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fifth (17.31) at Healesville over 300m. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Shepparton over 450m in 25.78. Followed that up with a minor placing over 450m at this track at T3 RSTW a week ago. Top-three hope with the right run.
